Checkpoint

Learning Dashboard

Checkpoint v1.0.0

Structured Knowledge Graph

Organize your videos into hierarchical modules, review lecture progress, and search your timestamped study notes.

User Preferences

Adjust tracker timings, active behaviors, and features.

Tracking Behavior

Throttled Tracking Interval How often the extension saves your playback position (in seconds). Lower values mean finer precision but more database writes.
5s
Auto Course Detection Automatically analyze video titles and group related lectures (e.g. "Lecture 1", "Lecture 2") into virtual courses without playlists.
Smart Revisit Warnings Suggest resuming video content that has been left incomplete and untouched for more than 30 days.

Data Management

Export database records, restore prior learning histories, or purge all data.

Database Utilities

Backup your study notes and progress to keep your learnings safe or sync them to other systems.

Export Learning State

Download a single JSON file containing all tracked history, course folders, notes, and workspaces.

Import Learning State

Restore your watch times, notes, and courses from an exported Checkpoint JSON file.

Purge Database

Completely delete all history, bookmarks, notes, workspaces, and playlists. This action is irreversible.
